nasb.text: Behold, we are slaves today, And as to the land which You gave to our fathers to eat of its fruit and its bounty, Behold, we are slaves in it.

esv.text: Behold, we are slaves this day; in the land that you gave to our fathers to enjoy its fruit and its good gifts, behold, we are slaves.

cnv.text: 我們今天竟成了奴僕！ 就是在你賜給我們列祖享用其上果實和美物之地， 我們竟在這地上作了奴僕！

ccb.text: 今天，我们沦为奴隶，在你赐给我们祖先的土地上，在你让我们祖先享用其出产和各样美物的土地上，我们沦为奴隶。
